channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: At least 930 people have died in Congo's Ebola outbreak
item.description: Congo's health ministry reported 930 deaths among 2,344 confirmed cases as of Saturday, with 37 new deaths recorded.

item.title: Putin meets North Korean foreign minister in diplomatic push
item.description: North Korean Foreign Minister Choe Son Hui's visit to Russia lacks a clear occasion, such as a multilateral event or state anniversary.

item.title: India's Gen Z 'Cockroach People's Party' began as satire but is serious about reform
item.description: Calling themselves 'cockroaches,' they march against corruption amid limited opportunities for young people.

item.title: Three U.S. service members killed in Iran conflict; Hunter Biden speaks to NPR
item.description: Three U.S. service members have died since Friday amid escalating U.S.-Iran tensions. Hunter Biden also spoke with NPR's Newsmakers program.
